atoms.semantic_claim: Payload builder config should expose downstream build-deadline and max-block-size configuration behavior; same-path overlap alone does not prove this behavior in the v2.2 port.

destinations.evidence: The destination retains protocol block-size enforcement but intentionally does not restore the old custom operator knob.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Run the destination behavior owned by crates/ethereum/payload/src/config.rs and verify the downstream-observed behavior still holds after the port refactor.
atoms.notes: The old configurable builder.max-block-size surface is not active in the v2.2 slice. The active payload builder retains protocol RLP-size enforcement for Osaka blocks, but no shipped Ritual runtime path currently supplies a custom per-node block-size cap.
atoms.required_change: No code change in this v2 slice; behavior is intentionally inactive or out of scope.

atoms.semantic_claim: Payload builder config preserves the default build deadline, environment override, invalid-env fallback, and explicit override semantics.

destinations.evidence: Destination file present in ritual-reth-internal-v2.2.0-port at crates/ethereum/payload/src/config.rs.

atoms.equivalence_argument: Downstream path `crates/ethereum/payload/src/config.rs` maps to v2.2 `crates/ethereum/payload/src/config.rs` (same_path). Structural integration preserved; line-by-line diff vs old fork not re-audited in this batch.
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Run or port the grouped downstream tests: test_default_build_deadline, test_build_deadline_from_env, test_build_deadline_invalid_env_falls_back, test_with_build_deadline_override, test_gas_limit_calculation.
atoms.notes: No concrete live runtime/API contract was proven for this broad/file-level atom during the feature-ordered pass; atomization is required before restoration.

summary: Remaining unresolved atoms are blocked for atomization or explicit scope decisions; concrete live behavior has been mapped or classified.
notes: The destination keeps the module at the same relative path with overlapping symbols ['default', 'new', 'with_gas_limit', 'with_await_payload_on_missing', 'gas_limit']. Curated test-atom insertion appended 1 grouped behavior atom(s) from coverage-map/test-atom-audit; raw helper/no-assert/default-only cases were not canonicalized.
